narrative.headline: ⚠ 1 security finding — review before other cleanup. All T1 items cleared! (141 review findings — run `desloppify issues`)

actions.description: 141 review findings need investigation — run `desloppify issues` to see the work queue
2 orphaned findings — delete dead files or relocate with `desloppify move`
21 flat_dirs findings — create subdirectories and use `desloppify move`
3 naming findings — rename files with `desloppify move` to fix conventions
1 cycles findings — break cycles by extracting shared code or using `desloppify move`
1 facade findings — flatten re-export facades or consolidate barrel files
85 structural findings — decompose large files — extract logic into focused modules
125 props findings — split bloated components, extract sub-components
14 react findings — refactor React antipatterns (state sync, provider nesting, hook bloat)
2 dupes findings — extract shared utility or consolidate duplicates
2 patterns findings — align to single pattern across the codebase
9 test_coverage findings — add tests for untested production modules — prioritize by import count
19 signature findings — consolidate inconsistent function signatures
12 responsibility_cohesion findings — split modules with too many responsibilities — extract focused sub-modules
2526 boilerplate_duplication findings — extract shared boilerplate into reusable helpers or base classes
202 smells findings — inspect with `desloppify next` and fix manually
1 exports findings — run `knip --fix` to remove dead exports
2 deprecated findings — remove deprecated symbols or migrate callers
1 security findings — review and fix security findings — prioritize by severity
647 files need design review — run design review with dimension templates

strategy.hint: 6 independent workstreams, safe to parallelize. Rescan after each phase to verify. Review: 141 finding(s) — `desloppify issues`.

move.reason: 2 orphaned files + 21 flat directories + 3 naming issues
